color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fused vs tuned-SGLang baseline
(vLLM/SGLang + separate harness + separate orchestrator)

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RESPONSIVENESS
sub-agent latency (p50/p99)
tool-call round-trip (p50/p99)
KV page-in stall p99
(tool-completion to first decoded token)

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
EFFICIENCY
tokens per resolved task
token per watt per user
cheap-tier token share

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ALWAYS-ON ENABLERS
idle-reclaim ratio
KV residency ratio (KV not pinned in HBM)
HBM bytes per always-on agent (amortized to suffix)
tier-hit dist (HBM/DRAM/SSD/recompute)

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TRUST
context-pollution rate (results quarantined)
pre-flight catch rate (rung 0-2 vs rung 3)
speculation hit rate (committed vs squashed)

div.style: color: rgb(94, 61, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Harness candidates on disk:
tau2-bench, Toolathlon,
metrics-service, tokencost, headroom

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
measure, don't assert
(fused vs tuned-SGLang baseline)
